name: Lady of the Lake
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>湖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>みずうみ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>乙女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おとめ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ヴィヴィアン
desc: Cannot be used as a Synchro Material, except for the Synchro Summon of a Warrior-Type monster. If this card is used for a Synchro Summon, banish it. When this card is Normal Summoned: You can target 1 "Noble Knight" Normal Monster in your Graveyard; Special Summon that target. If this card is in your Graveyard: You can target 1 Level 5 "Noble Knight" monster you control; reduce its Level by 1, and if you do, Special Summon this card from the Graveyard.

sets.set: Noble Knights of the Round Table Box Set

summoning: Cannot be used as a Synchro Material
Special Summons itself from your Graveyard
